name: Secura Group Limited
summary: Secura Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides an integrated suite of security products, services, and solutions in Singapore, the Philippines, and internationally. It operates through Security Printing; Security Guarding; Cyber Security; Homeland Security and Digital Forensic; and System Integration, Security Consultancy and Security Training segments. The company offers cyber security consultancy, products, and services; security courses; corporate/event security guarding services for heads of states and VIPs; and unarmed and manned security guarding services for commercial premises, data centers, embassies, hotels, schools, hospitals, government buildings, industrial premises, and residential properties. It also provides security printing services for various valued documents, including cheques, licenses, statements, computerized and pressure seal forms, and stationery; risk assessment, tender management, and project management solutions to customers in private and public sectors; homeland security and digital forensic services; integrated command center services; and systems integration and training services. In addition, the company offers private investigation services; distributes homeland security products; and provides data, eStatement, eArchiving, security data processing, printing, and stationery services. It serves customers in various industries, including multinational corporations, government agencies, financial institutions, and small and medium enterprises. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Singapore.
